3084090.name: Caramel Performance
3084090.description:
In this world, magic is percieved as a body anomaly, and its owners are condemned, censored and criticised. It's hard for them to find work, housing, and acceptance in society. And Evelyn Vozui is not an exception.

 

Evelyn is keeping a quiet living, struggling after moving to a new city. Her life is thrown upside down after being invited to join a troupe, housing magic owners only. As the story unfolds, you are absorbed in life of the Kriv circus and social and personal life of main character, as well as her troubles.

 

Evelyn's fate is in your hands from this point. What priorities will she set? What awaits her in the future? It's up to you to decide!

  

ATTENTION!!!

  

This product only has a prologue and first part, other chapters would be available in future.

 

Features:

2-3 hours of gameplay

 More than 12 unique characters present with more to come in the future

 Branching story and multiple endings (planned)

 Voiced in both English and Russian!
3084090.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
